system.powerDescription:
This is your reality. Select one psychic power effect to be temporarily suppressed in a CAT+1 area around yourself. A sin’s pressure mechanic cannot be chosen. For this power's duration it is treated as if the chosen effect is not active and all bonuses from it are lost. 

If the creature which originated the effect, e.g: a sin, is within this power's area it may choose to initiate a psyclash once per round as detailed in the binder rules. Stress is taken by both parties as normal and if the originating creature wins/ties this power ends early and may not be activated again for the rest of the scene.
